name: Tempting Trifle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Soft coconut macaroon cookie crumbs
3 packages (8 ounces each) Cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
Base: Press the cookie crumbs onto the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes.
Body: In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer until well blended. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the sour cream, whipping cream, sherry, and vanilla extract. Pour the mixture over the crust and bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill.
Topping: Heat the raspberry preserves in a saucepan over low heat until melted. Strain to remove seeds. Spoon over the cheesecake, spreading evenly to the edges. Top with whipped cream and toasted slivered almonds.
